function_v0.doc:
Transfer tokens through contract - receives from sender and sends back to sender

Parameters:
- sender: The address sending and receiving the tokens (must sign the transaction)
- token: The token contract address (use native XLM address for XLM transfers)
- amount: Amount of tokens to transfer (in stroops for XLM)

Example:
Transfer 1 XLM (10000000 stroops) from sender through contract back to sender
function_v0.name: transfer

function_v0.doc: Get the balance of an address for a specific token\nUseful for checking balances before/after transfer
function_v0.name: get_balance
